en-US.title: PlusUltra - AI App Development
en-US.shortDescription: Transform ideas into apps with AI-powered development platform
en-US.fullDescription:
PlusUltra revolutionizes app development with AI-powered code generation, real-time collaboration, and multi-platform exports.

🚀 **Key Features:**
• AI-powered code generation from natural language
• Real-time collaborative editing
• Multi-platform exports (React Native, Flutter, SwiftUI)
• Enterprise-grade security and compliance
• Advanced testing and deployment automation
• Temporal Code Intelligence for time-aware AI

🎯 **Why PlusUltra?**
• Most advanced AI development platform available
• Enterprise-grade reliability and security
• Real-time collaboration with conflict resolution
• Automated compliance and security validation
• Multi-platform deployment with store automation

📱 **Perfect For:**
• Startups building MVPs quickly
• Enterprises requiring secure, compliant apps
• Development teams needing collaboration tools
• Product managers prototyping ideas rapidly
• Developers exploring new technologies

🔒 **Security & Compliance:**
• GDPR, HIPAA, SOX compliance
• End-to-end encryption
• Audit trails and RBAC
• SOC2 certified infrastructure

es-ES.title: PlusUltra - Desarrollo de Apps con IA
es-ES.shortDescription: Transforma ideas en apps con plataforma de desarrollo impulsada por IA
es-ES.fullDescription: PlusUltra revoluciona el desarrollo de apps con generación de código impulsada por IA, colaboración en tiempo real y exportaciones multiplataforma.
